commands.review_summary:
The PR adds guarded plugin-manifest id/channel/alias reads in startup planning and registry id normalization, plus a regression test for preserving a healthy configured channel when a sibling manifest has an unreadable channel list.

PR surface: Source +86, Tests +51. Total +137 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main directly dereferences plugin.channels during startup planning and registry alias normalization, and the PR body records a direct pre-patch throw before healthy plugin ids were returned.
